name: Human
description: Adaptable, ambitious, and found almost everywhere.

name: Dwarf
description: Stubborn, strong-willed, and skilled with stone, metal, and old halls.

name: Elf
description: Graceful, long-lived, and tied to ancient forests, stars, or lost magic.

name: Halfling
description: Small, clever, quiet, and often underestimated.
gift_description: Once per game session, reroll a failed Grace roll.
